arts.ttl: Milan vs Roma – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: AC Milan host AS Roma in the Coppa Italia quarter-finals this evening. Both sides are aiming to salvage disappointing domestic campaigns with cup success this season. Milan conceded a last-gasp equaliser to draw the The Derby della Madonnina with Inter at the weekend. #CoppaItalia’s coming to town! 🔥#MilanRoma #SempreMilan pic.twitter.com/CcNMNuCVL9 — AC Milan (@acmilan) February […] The post Milan vs Roma – Predicted lineup and team news first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Roma and Ancelotti: Why Ranieri Might Choose the Real Madrid Manager as His Successor
arts.sum: As Roma's search for a new manager continues, all eyes are on current coach Claudio Ranieri, who has been tasked with selecting his own replacement. Ranieri, set to retire from coaching at the end of the season, faces the challenging decision of choosing who will lead the Giallorossi into the future.
